items.title: Text classification baselines
items.description: Spam detection, sentiment analysis, and topic tagging start with CountVectorizer or TfidfVectorizer feeding linear or generative classifiers—fast to ship and easy to inspect via token weights.

items.title: Search and information retrieval
items.description: TF–IDF vectorization remains a core representation for lexical search, document similarity, and ranking features before neural embeddings.

items.title: Log and ticket routing
items.description: Support tickets and security logs are classified by hashing or tf-idf features when vocabulary size is huge and latency must stay low on CPU.

items.title: Mixed tabular + text products
items.description: ColumnTransformer pipelines extract tf-idf from review text and scale numeric tenure or price columns into one matrix for churn or fraud models.
